prestazioni: Upgrade to a pair of Garrett GTX4286R turbochargers (58mm compressor, 76mm turbine) with billet compressor wheels and 3.5-inch V-band inlets/outlets, specifically calibrated for the C6 RS6's 5.0L TFSI CAUA V10 engine, paired with a custom 4-inch stainless steel downpipe system from Milltek Sport with 200-cell catalytic converters for optimized spool and flow dynamics while maintaining emissions compliance

Full fuel system overhaul including dual Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors (2000cc/min), and a custom Motec M150 ECU with flex-fuel capability, integrated with a 3.5-bar Bosch Motorsport fuel pressure sensor and a secondary fuel pressure regulator for the RS6's direct/port injection hybrid system

Installation of a custom VR38DETT-derived dry-sump oil system from Aviaid, featuring a 10-quart oil pan with integrated windage tray, dual scavenge pumps, and a Setrab 19-row oil cooler with AN-12 lines, paired with a Laminova oil-to-water heat exchanger to maintain optimal oil temperatures under sustained 800+ HP loads
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using the Liberty Walk LB-RS6 kit, modified to fit the C6's unique rear quarter panel contours, with custom 3D-printed ABS fender flares reinforced with carbon fiber weave for added rigidity, finished in a matte Porsche GT3 RS Green paint with exposed carbon weave accents

Custom front bumper replacement featuring a 3D-scanned and CNC-machined aluminum core, integrating a 10mm lower splitter from APR Performance with adjustable carbon fiber canards, paired with a custom carbon fiber hood from Vorsteiner with functional NACA ducts and a central heat extractor vent for the RS6's V10 engine

Rear diffuser and exhaust surround system from 93Octane, fabricated from 3mm aluminum and carbon fiber, featuring integrated quad 102mm titanium exhaust tips from Akrapovic, with a custom LED light bar embedded into the diffuser for a signature rear lighting effect, all mounted on a custom subframe reinforcement plate to prevent flex under high-speed aerodynamic loads
